artifact: IEC 62304 Traceability Matrix (variant A: evidence array per requirement)

rows.requirement_text: The checker returns an InteractionResult(outcome, direction) pair, never a bare boolean. outcome is one of NoInteractionExpected, Caution, CautionLowRelevance, Avoid, Contraindicated, DoseReductionAdvised, NotCovered; direction is BleedingRisk, ThrombosisRisk, NoRisk, or UnknownRisk - every one of the source's 17 sections is headed by exactly this distinction.

evidence.caveat: Formally proven against the stated specification.

rows.requirement_text: CheckInteraction(doac, agent, hasOtherBleedingRiskFactors) is a total, hardcoded pairwise lookup covering 15 of the source's 17 named sections with no extra caller input, excluding via precondition the two still-blocked apixaban cells (REQ-DDI-5).

evidence.caveat: Formally proven against the stated specification.

rows.requirement_text: SSRIs/SNRIs: dabigatran's dose-reduction advice is conditional on a caller-supplied hasOtherBleedingRiskFactors flag - both branches proven, not just the one exercised first.

evidence.caveat: Formally proven against the stated specification.

rows.requirement_text: Fail-safe: any (doac, agent) pair not present in the source's named set - including within-source gaps like apixaban+dronedarone - returns NotCovered, never silently NoInteractionExpected.

evidence.caveat: Formally proven against the stated specification.

rows.requirement_text: Rifampicin and carbamazepine/phenytoin/phenobarbital both make apixaban's outcome depend on a third axis, clinical indication (AF stroke prevention / DVT-PE recurrence prevention vs. other indications) - named, sourced, feasible, not built in v1 (the two affected cells are excluded via CheckInteraction's precondition, REQ-DDI-2, rather than given a silently wrong answer).
rows.code_location: none - deferred, not built in v1
notes: no evidence bound for this requirement

rows.requirement_text: The DoseReductionAdvised outcome kind is proven in v1; the specific numeric dose-reduction target per (doac, agent) is v1 informational text only, not a proven output. Staged v2, not dropped.
rows.code_location: none - v1 is classify-only, staged for v2
notes: no evidence bound for this requirement
